documentation.description: Structured task group built on Aion.Runtime and Aion.Join_Set.

simple_types.name: Task_Group
simple_types.code: type Task_Group (Max_Tasks : Positive) is limited private;

record_types.name: Task_Group_Stats

access_types.name: Runtime_Access
access_types.code: type Runtime_Access is access all Aion.Runtime.Runtime_Handle;

subprograms.name: Cancel
subprograms.code:
function Cancel
  (Group  : in out Task_Group;
   Reason : String := "task group cancelled")
   return Operation_Results.Result_Type

subprograms.name: Initialize
Join_All
subprograms.code:
function Join_All
  (Group   : in out Task_Group;
   Timeout : Aion.Types.Milliseconds := 0)
   return Operation_Results.Result_Type

subprograms.name: Spawn
